sentences.arabic: سَافَرَ جَابِرٌ إِلَى بَلَدٍ عَرَبِيٍّ لِزِيَارَةِ صَدِيقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Jabir je putovao u arapsku zemlju da posjeti prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: Jabir traveled to an Arab country to visit his friend.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَقْبَلَهُ الصَّدِيقُ فِي الْمَطَارِ وَرَحَّبَ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelj ga je dočekao na aerodromu i toplo pozdravio.
sentences.translationEn: His friend received him at the airport and welcomed him.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَهُ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ وَقَدَّمَ لَهُ الطَّعَامَ.
sentences.translation: Odveo ga je kući i ponudio ga hranom.
sentences.translationEn: He took him home and offered him food.

sentences.translation: Jabir je osjetio toplinu i dobrodošlicu.
